disclaimer: These stories are dramatized narratives pieced together from patterns observed across multiple organizations and roles over a 12-year career. Names, company identifiers, and certain details have been altered or fictionalized to protect confidentiality while preserving the technical and strategic truth of what happened. Think of them as composite case studies told as stories, not journalism.

posts.title: The $40M Close: How One Dashboard Changed Everything
posts.description: A story about building a real-time revenue intelligence system that gave a $2B company's leadership complete pipeline visibility, and the cultural resistance that almost killed it.

posts.title: The Pipeline That Wasn't Real: A Revenue Intelligence Story
posts.description: How I discovered that $300M in forecasted pipeline had no underlying data foundation, and what it took to rebuild trust between Sales and Finance.

posts.title: Why I Stopped Building Dashboards and Started Building Agents
posts.description: The shift from reactive reporting to proactive intelligence: how LLMs and agentic workflows are reshaping what business intelligence means in 2025.
